nasb.text: For David himself says in the book of Psalms, ‘The Lord said to my Lord, “Sit at My right hand,

esv.text: For David himself says in the Book of Psalms, “‘The Lord said to my Lord, “Sit at my right hand,

cnv.text: 大衛自己在詩篇上說： ‘主對我的主說： 你坐在我的右邊，

ccb.text: 大卫曾在诗篇里说， “‘主对我主说， 你坐在我的右边，

csbs.text: 大卫自己在诗篇里说： ‘主对我主说： 你坐在我的右边，
